qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Consider the following database table named water_schemes: The number of tuples returned by the following SQL query is _________. with total (name, capacity) as select district_name, sum (capacity) from water_schemes group by district_name with total_avg (capacity) as select avg (capacity) from tota

qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Consider a database that has the relation schema EMP (EmpId, EmpName, and DeptName). An instance of the schema EMP and a SQL query on it are given below: SELECT AVG(EC.Num) FROM EC WHERE (DeptName, Num) IN
